text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'll go grab us something to eat! I know the
perfect breakfast food! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the cafeteria one morning when I hear an
energetic voice. I glance over only to see
Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... I told Spe I hadn't eaten yet, so she
invited me to breakfast. And then...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: The person behind Spe also asked me to join, so...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...No, it's no hassle at all... Making sure Spe gets a
balanced breakfast shouldn't be hard...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes... I was just speaking with—

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: You've brought... quite a lot of food.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I got us ten hamburger steaks—enough to feed an
army! And you can't have breakfast without a kilo
of carrot pasta! Plus, supersized fruit salad for
dessert!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Eat this up and you'll be full of energy all day
long! ♪
choice_data_list: Could you share some with me?
Could you share some with me?
Chow down and get that energy boost!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Eat this up and you'll be full of energy all day
long! ♪
choice_data_list: Could you share some with me?
Could you share some with me?
Chow down and get that energy boost!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Of course! There's nothing more fun than eating
together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
When you share your food, you get less to eat...
but it leaves you more satisfied...
choice_data_list: That was quite the balanced meal.
That was quite the balanced meal.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I've still got some room over here. Maybe
it's time for another helping...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well... they say that moderation is the key to
good health...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how do you know one of my mom's favorite
sayings?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Maybe we talked about this before. My
birth mother used to say that all the time.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No, but I heard that from someone very close to
you...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-oh! That makes sense! Was it Suzuka? Hmm, or
maybe Sei...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, maybe I should listen for once. I guess that's
it for breakfast then!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Good choice...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Right. But first... we need to split up the food.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
It's not fair... How come I'm left with all the
salad...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
You shouldn't eat too much... And more salad
means a more balanced meal...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Don't do this to me... At least give me another
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ouch!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Did someone just whack me on the head?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Now then, let's eat.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nooo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe goes on to polish off her very
large breakfast.
